description_long: This is a cylindrical woven handbag with a natural straw or wicker texture, featuring a wide, reinforced brown fabric band around the upper rim and extending down the sides. The bag has two large, round handles wrapped in a matching brown material, attached symmetrically on either side for easy carrying. The interior appears spacious and open, with no visible internal compartments or lining details. The woven body gives the bag a lightweight yet sturdy appearance, suitable for carrying personal items. The brown fabric accents provide both structural support and a visual contrast to the lighter woven material. There are no visible logos, decorative elements, or closure mechanisms, giving the bag a simple, utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A cylindrical woven handbag with brown fabric accents and two large round handles, featuring a simple and utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the open, cylindrical interior and the two round handles extending upward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the brown fabric band and the symmetrical placement of the two round handles.
description_view_2: Top-down view from the opposite side, again showing the open interior and handle arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, with the brown fabric band and handles visible.
attribute_strap_type: Two large, round, fixed handles wrapped in brown fabric; short handle style, not adjustable, attached at the rim.
attribute_closure_mechanism: None; the main compartment is open with no visible closure.
